{{Quote|So, the Republic would have the galaxy believe that its heart is secure. Today's events, however, show that there is nothing that can stop our forces from total victory.|General Grievous|<ref name="HNN 15:3:02" />}}
The '''Battle of Duro''' was one of the many battles of [[Operation Durge's Lance]], a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] campaign to spearhead into the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core]], during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It proved to be a major Confederate victory.

==The battle==
At 0221 local time, Operation Durge's Lance had broken through the outer system defenses of [[Duro/Legends|Duro]], destroying four [[Golan Arms/Legends|Golan Arms]] battle platforms, and three [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class ships]]—[[Anvil (Acclamator-class)|''Anvil'']], [[Coronet (Acclamator-class)|''Coronet'']], and ''[[Bolide]]''. Also destroyed were two [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruisers]]—[[Prominence (Dreadnaught-class)|''Prominence'']], and ''[[Atrisian Iron]]''. After the initial attack, only four more Acclamators, a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]], and another ''Dreadnaught'' remained.

One of Duro's largest space cities, [[Jyvus Space City]], had surrendered to the [[Confederate Navy/Legends|Confederate Navy]]. Divisions of [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] and [[Neimoidian irregulars]] transformed the floating city into a field command station for the [[Office of the General]]. At the same time [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] Chief Representative Officer [[Hoolidan Keggle]] had gone missing. Intelligence speculated that Keggle fled the city down to the planet below. The [[Confederate First Fleet|First]] and [[Confederate Third Fleet|Third Fleets]] of the [[Confederate Navy/Legends|Confederate Navy]], the original task force launched from [[Yag'Dhul/Legends|Yag'Dhul]], had been provisioned by supply lines from [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] and [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]]. [[Hardcell-class interstellar transport/Legends|Techno Union ships]] had launched [[seismic EMP countermine]]s to clear the way for an easy attack.

[[File:75GeneralGrievousFinal.jpg|thumb|left|150px|General Grievous hoists the Confederacy flag over a conquered Duro.]]
To counter the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]] fleet, the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] sent a squadron of [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Jedi starfighters]] and two wings of [[V-19 Torrent starfighter/Legends|V-19 ''Torrent'' starfighters]]. But [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|Vulture droids]] and [[Droid tri-fighter/Legends|droid tri-fighters]] easily broke through the Republic counterattack, managing to destroy another three assault ships. The [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]] forces were then positioned to cut off all [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] reinforcements from [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]] or [[Nubia/Legends|Nubia]]. After capturing [[Jyvus Space City]], the Confederacy was able to drop the [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary shields]] protecting [[Duro/Legends|Duro]]. Separatist [[drop-fighter]]s and capital ships began [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|orbital bombardment]] of planetside industrial factories. The bombardment let the troops land and during a week of hard fighting, city after city began to fall to the Confederacy until [[Hoolidan Keggle]] signed [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous's]] capitulation to the Confederacy. The battle lasted less than a week.

==Aftermath==
The battle completely destroyed the already fragile ecosystem of Duro. The orbital bombardment had destroyed the last safeguards against the toxins, waste and air pollutants. It left Duro impossible to live on without protective hazard gear. This forced the remainder of the population of Duro to also move off surface, to the [[City-ship|orbiting cities]] of Duro.<ref name="SoF">''[[Suns of Fortune]]''</ref>

Following the battle, the [[Senate Bureau of Intelligence/Legends|Senate Bureau of Intelligence]] investigated causes of the defeat. A month later, in a report issued by Agent [[Inglemenn Barezz]], it was revealed that fraudulent requisition datamemos had placed the three newly commissioned [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyers]] allocated to protect [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] as undergoing "shakedown cruises" at a classified location. In reality, they had been redistributed to the [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]]-[[Ando/Legends|Ando]] battlefront in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] by the chairman of the [[Senate Action Subcommittee for Corellian Trade Spine Defense]], the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Onaconda Farr/Legends|Onaconda Farr]]. It was also revealed that [[Iseno/Legends|Iseno]] Senator [[Ronet Coorr]] had reassigned warships from Iseno, which should have aided Duro, to Rodia after being bribed with millions of credits and promised contracts for rebuilding on Ando by Farr.

After the release of the report, both Coorr and Farr resigned from the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]]. A public backlash against both the Senate and [[Rodian/Legends|Rodians]] in general was provoked, with calls for giving the [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] full power to conduct the war and for giving Humans command of fleets stationed around rival planets. A full investigation of [[Senate Action Subcommittee]]s was launched with the goal of restructuring them. The Battle of Duro was one of General Grievous' most impressive military victories, and caused many within the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] to view him as a greater threat than [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]].

Duro would be [[Second battle of Duro|liberated]] by the Republic later in the same year. Along with victories at [[Battle of Commenor (Clone Wars)|Commenor]], and [[Battle of Balmorra (Clone Wars)|Balmorra]], the battle was instrumental driving the Confederacy from its bases in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] and the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] regions of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] and beginning the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]].<ref name="The Essential Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
